title: Dimension Teleporter
description: The mod expands teleportation capabilities by adding a new command with which you can teleport to other dimensions.
body:
The Dimension Teleporter mod is an innovative expansion of the teleportation capabilities in Minecraft. It adds a new command that allows players to move between different dimensions of the game. Now you can easily travel between the World, the Nether and the End, discovering new adventures and resources.
## Command:
```
/dimension_teleport <player> <dimension> [x y z]
```
